title: Oil rebounds as focus returns to tightening supplies
section_path: Oil rebounds as focus returns to tightening supplies
section_path_text: Oil rebounds as focus returns to tightening supplies
summary:
Main
Calm returned to financial markets, with commodities finding some support amid renewed interest in risk assets. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-08-07 112817.png | assets/2024-08-07_c73c9mmewcibd80efwdxbszoqy4bbt_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_1f96401c0362.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices recovered following Monday's selloff amid a rebound in risk appetite across broader financial markets. With technicals suggesting the market was in oversold territory, WTI and Brent crude managed to rise more than 1%.
